title: Gilded Netherite
description: Makes netherite match its crafting recipe, by adding gold to it!
body:
Have you ever noticed that netherite has gold in its recipe, but doesn't have any speck of gold on it in any other form?
I did, and I decided to add gold to it!


![gilded netherite banner, with all the textures changed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cc1034bdb39f18367616ca59b656625fb8ce507.png)

The image above shows all the textures changed, and I tried to make the gold look like its actually doing something on the tools, instead of just having specks of it everywhere.


_This resource pack can be used in modpacks, as long as they stay in the Modrinth ecosystem. This resource pack can NOT be redistributed without permission (cough) 9Minecraft (cough)._
